name: Ghost Button
description: A button with minimal visual emphasis, used for secondary or auxiliary actions.

guidelines.purpose: Ghost Button is a button that does not have a container and minimizes visual emphasis. It is primarily used for auxiliary or low-priority actions, providing operations without interfering with other buttons or content.

priority_system.Primary: Used to assist major actions like Button-Primary or to provide additional options.
priority_system.Secondary: Used for neutral or low-priority operations (cancel, close, etc.).

do: Combine with Button-Primary to maintain operation hierarchy.
Use labels that clearly indicate the intention.
dont: Do not use Ghost button alone to induce actions. Always use Button-Primary for the most important action.
Do not use Icon-only if the meaning is ambiguous.
